descs.desc: [StartBattle] Lose 2 [Laceration] Potency on self (3 times per turn. If [Laceration] Potency drops to 0 or less, the [Laceration] effect expires)

1061001.name: How to Hunt Cheerfully
1061001.desc:
If the target is a  or a , deal +10% damage
On Skill Use, if this unit has [Laceration], inflict 3 [Burst] On Hit (once per turn)

1061011.name: How to Hunt Cheerfully
1061011.desc:
If the target is a , , or if the target has 10+ [Burst], deal +10% damage
On Skill Use, if this unit has [Laceration], inflict 3 [Burst] On Hit (2 times per turn)

1061021.name: Bloodfiend Hunting Manual - Styptics
1061021.desc:
Combat Start: 1 ally with the highest sum of [Laceration] Potency and Count loses 2 [Laceration] Count
When 1 ally with the fastest Speed hits an enemy with [Burst], inflict 1 [DefenseDown] (2 times per turn)
